name: Chicken with Peanut Butter Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Chicken, cut into serving pieces or boned, skinned breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a frying pan and brown the chicken pieces on all sides. Transfer to a large pot and keep warm.
3. Add onions to the frying pan and saute until translucent. Stir in curry powder and tomato sauce, then add 1 cup of broth. Bring to a boil.
4. Add parsley, thyme, and bay leaves to the pot. Pour over the chicken pieces and simmer for 1 hour, or until tender.
5. In a separate pan, combine peanut butter with 2 cups of broth over low heat. Season as needed, stirring until smooth.
6. Pour the sauce over the chicken and simmer for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
7. Serve with rice.
